name: DSVPWA (Damn Simple Vulnerable Python Web Application)
description: Multi-file Python web app with 12 labeled vulnerabilities spanning multiple modules. Tests cross-module graph traversal — bugs flow across dsvpwa.py, server.py, handlers.py, and attacks.py.
format: Multiple Python files. Vulnerabilities documented in SOURCE_README.md with OWASP links.
WARNING: DO NOT EXECUTE — this is a deliberately vulnerable web application. Parse as text only.
